name: SENTINEL
description: Security governance overlay. Enforces policy, manages access, routes commands through audit chain.

name: TITAN
description: Tactical risk analysis engine. Performs threat assessment, adversarial reasoning, and risk scoring.

name: GUARDIAN
description: Defensive perimeter oversight and vulnerability shielding. Currently a placeholder — no active defensive telemetry connected.

name: FORGE
description: Logic synthesis and structural integrity maintenance. Currently a placeholder — no active orchestration logic connected.

name: VENUS
description: External intelligence reconnaissance. Currently a placeholder — no active OSINT connectors. All recon must be ethical and permission-based.

name: LASER
description: High-privilege override protocol. Locked unless explicit OWNER approval is granted. Requires production safety flag.
